title: settings — retention windows
description: SettingValue rows retained while the owning scope is active. Cascade delete on scope erasure.
compliance_regimes_referenced: gdpr Art. 5 (storage limitation) + Art. 17 (erasure cascades on user + workspace delete)
soc2 CC8.1 (change management via audit dual-write)

hot.description: Platform defaults. Never purged unless the field itself is removed.

purge.trigger: field removed from the compiled registry

retention.description: Retained per activity + audit module rules. Activity: tier-based (30/90/365d). Audit: 365d hot + 2555d cold.
